zh.Saint John The Baptist Church, Littlehem: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Arundell III於大約1310年出生在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾時，他的父親Sir John Arundell II18歲，母親Isabel Bere22歲。他於大約1335年與Elizabeth Carminow在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1376年11月5日在奧地利享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Arundell III于大约1310年出生在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾时，他的父亲Sir John Arundell II18岁，母亲Isabel Bere22岁。他于大约1335年与Elizabeth Carminow在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1376年11月5日在奥地利享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Arundell III was born about 1310, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir John Arundell II, was 18 and his mother, Isabel Bere, was 22. He married Elizabeth Carminow about 1335, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 5 November 1376, in Austria, at the age of 67, and was buried in St John the Baptist's Church, Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Saint John The Baptist Church, Littlehem: St John the Baptist's Church, Godolphin Cross, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Arundell III est né environ 1310, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Arundell II, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Isabel Bere, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Carminow environ 1335, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1376, à Autriche, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à St John the Baptist's Church, Godolphin Cross, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Arundell III um 1310 in Lanherne, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Arundell II 18 und seine Mutter Isabel Bere 22. Er hat um 1335 in Lanherne, Cornwall, England Elizabeth Carminow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 5. November 1376 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Österreich und wurde in St John the Baptist's Church, Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Arundell III è nato il circa 1310 nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir John Arundell II, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Bere, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Carminow circa 1335, nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 novembre 1376, nel Austria, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a St John the Baptist's Church, Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Arundell IIIが約1310年にイギリスコルンワルランハーンで生まれた時，父Sir John Arundell IIは18歳，母Isabel Bereは22歳であった。約1335年にイギリスコルンワルランハーンでElizabeth Carminowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1376年11月5日にオーストリアで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルゴドルフィン クロススト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint John The Baptist Church, Littlehem: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 고돌필 크로스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Arundell III(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Arundell II(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Bere(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1335년 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 Elizabeth Carminow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1376년 11월 5일 오스트리아에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 고돌필 크로스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Arundell III nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Arundell II, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Bere, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Carminow aproximadamente 1335, em Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1376, em Áustria, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em St John the Baptist's Church, Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint John The Baptist Church, Littlehem: ст джон т баптист'с чурч, годолфин кросс, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Arundell III родился около 1310 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Arundell II было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Bere, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Carminow около 1335 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 5 ноября 1376 г. в местности Австрия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, годолфин кросс, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Arundell III nació aproximadamente 1310, en Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Arundell II, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Isabel Bere, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Carminow aproximadamente 1335, en Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1376, en Austria, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en St John the Baptist's Church, Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
